intro: Malaxis brachystachys, also known as the Dwarf Malaxis or Short-spurred Malaxis, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, and its extracts have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and oxidative stress, due to its purported health benefits in reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing.
